person.userCertifiedLifeSummary:
armoirie de la famille des Baux (del Balzo) :

relevé JPR Teyssier Chalancon Mangas

zh.lifeSummary: 當Bertrand II des Baux於1245年4月5日出生在法國布-度-o貝-利艾堂時，他的父親Guillaume des Baux-Orange33歲，母親Eugaris de Châteauneuf-Tournel15歲。他與Bérangère d’Andria結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1309年6月17日在勒尼 迪 拿坡里拿坡里享年64歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Bertrand II des Baux于1245年4月5日出生在法国布-度-o貝-利艾堂时，他的父亲Guillaume des Baux-Orange33岁，母亲Eugaris de Châteauneuf-Tournel15岁。他与Bérangère d’Andria结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1309年6月17日在勒尼 迪 拿坡里拿坡里享年64岁。

nameMeanings.name: des
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Indian: variant of   Deo  . In Maharashtra, Konkanastha Brahmins have a clan called Dev.

variants.name: Deo
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ravindra, Sohini, Vivek, Ajay, Alok, Anil, Annapurna, Daya, Ganga, Goutam, Harnek, Indra.

Indian (northern states): from Sanskrit deva ‘deity, lord’. This was a title used by ruling families in northern India. There is a Jat tribe called Deo. In northeastern India this name is spelled and pronounced Deb . Elsewhere, a common variant is Dev .
Italian: from a short form of the personal names Amadeo, Laudadeo, or Sperindeo, of which only the first now remains in use as a personal name.

nameMeanings.name: Baux
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Hauck
meanings: German: from a dialect variant of the ancient Germanic personal name Hugo (see Hugh ). Compare Haug .

variants.name: Houx
meanings: French (northern) and Walloon: topographic name from French houx ‘holly’, or a habitational name from any of the places called with this word, for example in Eure-et-Loir (France) and in the province of Namur in Belgium (Wallonia).
German: rare northern variant of   Haux   and, in North America, (also) an altered form of this.

nameMeanings.name: Bertrand
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Medieval French variant of   Bertram  , imported to Britain by the Normans. In modern times it has been made famous by the English philosopher  Bertrand Russell  (  1872–1970 ), but is only in occasional use.

nameMeanings.name: II
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Bertrand II des Baux was born on 5 April 1245, in Berre-l'Étang, Bouches-du-Rhône, France, his father, Guillaume des Baux-Orange, was 33 and his mother, Eugaris de Châteauneuf-Tournel, was 15. He married Bérangère d’Andria. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 17 June 1309, in Naples, Kingdom of Naples, at the age of 64.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Bertrand II des Baux est né le 5 avril 1245, à Berre-l'Étang, Bouches-du-Rhône, France, son père, Guillaume des Baux-Orange, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Eugaris de Châteauneuf-Tournel, avait 15 ans. Il a épousé Bérangère d’Andria. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 17 juin 1309, à Napoli, Regno di Napoli, à l’âge de 64 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Bertrand II des Baux am 5. April 1245 in Berre-l'Étang, Bouches-du-Rhône, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Guillaume des Baux-Orange 33 und seine Mutter Eugaris de Châteauneuf-Tournel 15. Er hat Bérangère d’Andria geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 17. Juni 1309 im Alter von 64 Jahren in Neapel, Neapel.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Bertrand II des Baux è nato il il 5 aprile 1245 nel Berre-l'Étang, Bouches-du-Rhône, Francia, il suo padre, Guillaume des Baux-Orange, aveva 33 anni e il suo madre, Eugaris de Châteauneuf-Tournel, aveva 15 anni. Lui sposato Bérangère d’Andria. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 17 giugno 1309, nel Napoli, Regno di Napoli, all'età di 64 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Bertrand II des Bauxが1245年4月5日にフランスボウチェス-ドウ-ルhoンバーレ-ル'eタンで生まれた時，父Guillaume des Baux-Orangeは33歳，母Eugaris de Châteauneuf-Tournelは15歳であった。Bérangère d’Andriaと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1309年6月17日にレグノ ジー ナポリナポリで64歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Bertrand II des Baux(이)가 1245년 4월 5일 프랑스 부체스-드-ho니 베레-'e탠그에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Guillaume des Baux-Orange(은)는 33세였고, 그의 어머니 Eugaris de Châteauneuf-Tournel(은)는 15세였다. 그는 Bérangère d’Andria(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1309년 6월 17일 레뇰 디 나폴리 나폴리에서 64세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.5 April 1245–17 June 1309: 1245 оны Дөрөвдүгээр сарын 5–1309 оны Зургаадугаар сарын 17

pt.5 April 1245–17 June 1309: 5 de abril de 1245–17 de junho de 1309
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Bertrand II des Baux nasceu em 5 de abril de 1245, em Berre-l'Étang, Bouches-du-Rhône, França, seu pai, Guillaume des Baux-Orange, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Eugaris de Châteauneuf-Tournel, tinha 15 anos. Ele casou-se com Bérangère d’Andria. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 17 de junho de 1309, em Napoli, Regno di Napoli, com 64 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Bertrand II des Baux родился 5 апреля 1245 г. в местности бирре-л'eтанг, боучес-ду-рoн, Франция, его отцу по имени Guillaume des Baux-Orange было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Eugaris de Châteauneuf-Tournel, 15. Он женился на женщине по имени Bérangère d’Andria. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер 17 июня 1309 г. в местности наполи, регно ди наполи в возрасте 64 лет.

es.5 April 1245–17 June 1309: 5 de abril de 1245–17 de junio de 1309
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Bertrand II des Baux nació el 5 de abril de 1245, en Berre-l'Étang, Bouches-du-Rhône, Francia, su papá, Guillaume des Baux-Orange, tenía 33 años y su mamá, Eugaris de Châteauneuf-Tournel, tenía 15 años. Se casó con Bérangère d’Andria. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 17 de junio de 1309, en Napoli, Regno di Napoli, a la edad de 64 años.
